description_long: This lamp features a distinctive industrial steampunk design, constructed primarily from dark metal pipes and fittings. The lamp has a circular, gear-like base supporting a vertical pipe structure, which is adorned with a large, toothed gear and a cylindrical gauge or dial. The upper section includes a wide, shallow metal shade with a visible bulb beneath, connected to the main body by a horizontal pipe. The exposed bulb and mechanical elements, such as the gear and gauge, give the lamp a mechanical, retro-futuristic aesthetic. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, with visible bolts and textured metal surfaces.
description: A steampunk-inspired industrial lamp with a metal pipe frame, gear and gauge details, and a wide metal shade exposing a single bulb.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular base, central gauge, and the wide metal shade with the bulb visible underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large gear, horizontal pipe arm, and the exposed bulb beneath the metal shade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical pipe structure and the back of the gauge and gear components.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the gear, gauge, and the industrial pipework supporting the lamp shade.
